source: ALMA-scored + CivicGraph community-controlled orgs, categorised by entity type and community-control status

category_legend.community_led: Aboriginal corporation or community-controlled organisation — primary anchor candidate pool
category_legend.government_service: Government department, court, police, or statutory authority — service provider, not anchor
category_legend.ngo_or_charity: Registered charity/NGO without community-controlled flag; may serve Indigenous youth but not Indigenous-led
category_legend.foundation_or_funder: Philanthropic foundation — potential co-funder, not anchor
category_legend.indigenous_corp_unverified: Indigenous corp without community-controlled flag set (data gap, investigate)
category_legend.coalition_peak: Coalition, peak body, or alliance — strategic partner, not typically anchor
